panels.description: Total Frontends node number
panels.title: FE Node Number

panels.description: Total not alive number of Frontends.
panels.title: FE Not Alive Number

panels.description: Total Backends node number
panels.title: BE Node Number

panels.description: Total not alive number of Backends.
panels.title: BE Not Alive Number

panels.description:
JVM Heap usage of specified Frontend.
Left Y Axes shows the used/max heap size.
Right Y Axes shows the used percentage.

targets.expr: sum(jvm_heap_size_bytes{group="fe", type="used", instance=~"$fe_instance", job="$cluster_id"} * 100) by (instance, job) / sum(jvm_heap_size_bytes{group="fe", instance=~"$fe_instance", type="max", job="$cluster_id"}) by (instance, job)

panels.title: FE JVM Heap Used Rate

panels.description: The compaction score of each BE
panels.title: BE Compaction Score

panels.description: Left Y axes indicates the total received bytes rate of txn. Right Y axes indicates the loaded rows rate of txn.

targets.expr: sum(rate(doris_be_stream_load{group="be", compute_group=~"$compute_group", instance=~"$be_instance", job="$cluster_id", type="load_rows"}[$__rate_interval])) by (instance)

panels.title: Load Rows Rate

panels.description:
Queries per seconds on each Frontends.
Queries only include Select requests.

targets.expr: max by(job, instance) (doris_fe_qps{job="$cluster_id", group="fe", instance=~"$fe_instance", user="", cluster_id=""})

panels.title: QPS

panels.description: 99 quantiles of query latency on each Frontends.

targets.expr: max by (job, instance, user) (doris_fe_query_latency_ms{job="$cluster_id", quantile="0.99", group="fe", instance=~"$fe_instance"})

panels.title: 99th Latency

targets.expr: sum by (instance) (rate(doris_be_num_io_bytes_read_from_cache{job="$cluster_id", group="be", compute_group=~"$compute_group", name=~".*"}[$__rate_interval])) / (sum by (instance) (rate(doris_be_num_io_bytes_read_total{job="$cluster_id", group="be",compute_group=~"$compute_group", name=~".*"}[$__rate_interval])) + 1e-10)

sum(doris_be_disk_bytes_read{job="$cluster_id", compute_group=~"$compute_group", instance=~"$be_instance", device=~".*"}) by (job, instance) / sum(doris_be_disk_read_time_ms{job="$cluster_id", compute_group=~"$compute_group", instance=~"$be_instance", device=~".*"}) by (job, instance) / 1048576

sum(doris_be_disk_bytes_written{job="$cluster_id", compute_group=~"$compute_group", instance=~"$be_instance", device=~".*"}) by (job, instance) / sum(doris_be_disk_read_time_ms{job="$cluster_id", compute_group=~"$compute_group", instance=~"$be_instance", device=~".*"}) by (job, instance) / 1048576

panels.description: CPU Used Rate dashboard includes 'iowait' mode

targets.expr: 100 - sum by(job, instance) (rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{job=~"$cluster_id.*",mode="idle",group=~"$node_exporter_group"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by(job, instance) (rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{job=~"$cluster_id.*",group=~"$node_exporter_group"}[$__rate_interval])) * 100

panels.title: CPU Used Rate

targets.expr: sum by(job, instance) (node_memory_MemTotal_bytes{job=~"$cluster_id.*",group=~"$node_exporter_group"} - node_memory_MemFree_bytes{job=~"$cluster_id.*",group=~"$node_exporter_group"} - node_memory_Cached_bytes{job=~"$cluster_id.*",group=~"$node_exporter_group"} - node_memory_Buffers_bytes{job=~"$cluster_id.*",group=~"$node_exporter_group"} - node_memory_SReclaimable_bytes{job=~"$cluster_id.*",group=~"$node_exporter_group"}) / sum by(job, instance) (node_memory_MemTotal_bytes{job=~"$cluster_id.*",group=~"$node_exporter_group"}) * 100

panels.description:
Requests per seconds on each Frontends.
Requests include all requests sending to the Frontends.

targets.expr: max by(job, instance, user) (doris_fe_rps{job="$cluster_id", group="fe", instance=~"$fe_instance", cluster_id=""})

panels.title: RPS

panels.description:
Queries per seconds on each Frontends.
Queries only include Select requests.

targets.expr: max by(job, instance) (doris_fe_qps{job="$cluster_id", group="fe", instance=~"$fe_instance", user="", cluster_id=""})

panels.title: QPS

panels.description: 99 quantiles of query latency on each Frontends.

targets.expr: max by (job, instance, user) (doris_fe_query_latency_ms{job="$cluster_id", group="fe", instance=~"$fe_instance", cluster_id="", quantile="0.99"})

panels.title: 99th Latency

panels.description:
Left Y axes indicates 95 to 99 quantiles of query latency on each Frontends.
Right Y axes indicates the query rate per 1 min.

targets.expr: max by(job, instance, quantile, user) (doris_fe_query_latency_ms{job="$cluster_id", group="fe", instance=~"$fe_instance", cluster_id=""})

panels.title: Query Percentile

panels.description:
Left Y axes indicates the accumulated  error queries number.
Right Y axes indicates the error query rate per 1 min.
Normally, the error query rate should be 0.

targets.expr: max by (job, instance, user) (doris_fe_query_err{job="$cluster_id", instance=~"$fe_instance", cluster_id=""})
max by(job, instance, user) (doris_fe_query_err_rate{job="$cluster_id", instance=~"$fe_instance", cluster_id=""})

panels.title: Query Error

panels.description: Number of mysql connections of each Frontend.

targets.expr: max by(job, instance) (doris_fe_connection_total{job="$cluster_id", group="fe", instance=~"$fe_instance", cluster_id=""})

panels.title: FE Mysql Connections

panels.description:
The counter of meta data image generation on Master Frontend. And the counter of image successfully pushing to other Non-master Frontends.
These metrics is expected to increase at reasonable intervals. And normally, they should be equal.
panels.title: Image Counter

panels.description: The left Y axes shows write latency of 99th. The right Y axes shows the write per seconds of journal.
panels.title: BDBJE Write Latency & Rate

panels.description: The left Y axes shows the read per seconds of journal.
panels.title: BDBJE Read Rate

panels.description:
JVM Heap usage of specified Frontend.
Left Y Axes shows the used/max heap size.
Right Y Axes shows the used percentage.

targets.expr: sum by (instance) (jvm_heap_size_bytes{job="$cluster_id", instance=~"$fe_instance", type="used"}) * 100 / sum by (instance) (jvm_heap_size_bytes{job="$cluster_id",instance=~"$fe_instance", type="max"})

panels.title: JVM Heap

panels.description:
JVM Non Heap usage of specified Frontend.
Left Y Axes shows the used/committed non heap size.
panels.title: JVM Non Heap

panels.description: Num of threads of FE JVM
panels.title: JVM Threads

panels.description:
JVM old generation usage of specified Frontend. Left Y Axes shows the used/max old generation size. Right Y Axes shows the used percentage.
Normally, the usage percentage should be less than 80%.

targets.expr: sum(jvm_old_size_bytes{job="$cluster_id", group="fe", instance=~"$fe_instance", type="used"}) * 100 / sum(jvm_old_size_bytes{job="$cluster_id", group="fe", instance=~"$fe_instance", type="max"})

panels.title: JVM Old

panels.description:
JVM young generation usage of specified Frontend.
Left Y Axes shows the used/max young generation size.
Right Y Axes shows the used percentage.Normally, the usage percentage should be less than 80%.

targets.expr: sum by (instance) (jvm_young_size_bytes{job="$cluster_id", group="fe", instance=~"$fe_instance", type="used"}) * 100 / sum by (instance) (jvm_young_size_bytes{job="$cluster_id", group="fe", instance=~"$fe_instance", type="max"})

panels.title: JVM Young

panels.description: Cluster's max Compaction Score value collected by master FE
panels.title: Cluster Max Compaction Score

panels.description: Number of tablets begin scheduled. These tablet may be in recovery process or balance process
panels.title: Scheduling Tablets

panels.description: The file descriptor usage of Backends. Left Y axes shows the used fd num. Right Y axes shows the soft limit open file number.
panels.title: BE FD Count

panels.description: The thread number of Backends
panels.title: BE Thread Num

panels.description: Number of tablets of each Backends
panels.title: Tablet Distribution

panels.description:
Base compaction rate of Backends.
Normally, base compaction only runs between 20:00 to 4:00 and it is configurable.
Right Y axes indicates the total base compaction bytes.
panels.title: BE Compaction Base

panels.description:
Cumulative compaction rate of Backends.
Right Y axes indicates the total cumulative compaction bytes.
panels.title: BE Compaction Cumulate

panels.description:
Loading rate of Backends.
This indicates the rate of file downloading in LOADING state of load job(MINI and BROKER load).
Right Y axes indicates the total rate of file downloading.
panels.title: BE Push Bytes

panels.description:
Loading rows rate of Backends.
This indicates the rate of rows loaded in LOADING state of load job. Right Y axes shows the total push rate of cluster.
panels.title: BE Push Rows

panels.description:
Scan rate of Backends.
This indicates the read rate when processing queries.
panels.title: BE Scan Bytes

panels.description:
Scan rows rate of Backends.
This indicates the read rows rate when processing queries.
panels.title: BE Scan Rows

panels.description: bthread worker count.
panels.title: Bthread Worker Count

panels.title: Bthread Worker Usage

panels.title: BE Light Work pool Queue Size

panels.description: BE light work active threads

panels.title: BE Heavy Work Active Threads

targets.expr: (sum by(cluster_name, group, instance, compute_group, job, workload_group) (rate(doris_be_workload_group_cpu_time_sec{job="$cluster_id", group="be", compute_group=~"$compute_group", instance=~"$be_instance"}[$__rate_interval])) / scalar(max(doris_be_avail_cpu_num{job="$cluster_id", group="be", compute_group=~"$compute_group",instance=~"$be_instance"}))) * 100
sum by (job, instance, workload_group) (doris_be_workload_group_mem_used_bytes{job="$cluster_id", group="be", instance=~"$be_instance"} / 1.048675e+06)

sum by(job, compute_group, instance, group, workload_group) (rate(doris_be_workload_group_local_scan_bytes{job="$cluster_id", group="be", compute_group=~"$compute_group", instance=~"$be_instance"}[$__rate_interval]) / 1.048675e+06)

sum by(job, compute_group, instance, group, workload_group) (rate(doris_be_workload_group_remote_scan_bytes{job="$cluster_id", group="be", compute_group=~"$compute_group", instance=~"$be_instance"}[$__rate_interval]) / 1.048675e+06)

panels.title: Workload Group File Read Rate(Local & Remote)
